description: A vertical 'Labor News' headline card from the U.S. Department of Labor. The photograph fills most of the frame in warm tones: a young man with short dark hair, wearing a dark blue/navy long-sleeve shirt and a tan/khaki canvas work apron, leans over a workbench using a tool; behind him, the blurred wall of a workshop is hung with rows of hand tools. The lower portion darkens with a navy gradient and bears a faint embossed Department of Labor seal watermark at lower right. A small blue tab with white italic serif text reads 'Labor News' (with three short vertical accent bars). Below, white serif headline text reads: 'US Department of Labor issues guidance on Registered Apprenticeship aimed at accelerating growth, reducing burdens, improving transparency.' Bottom-right small white text reads 'DOL.GOV.'
notable_text: Labor News - US Department of Labor issues guidance on Registered Apprenticeship aimed at accelerating growth, reducing burdens, improving transparency / DOL.GOV
